Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar May-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EMA BELL's Motion To File Second Amended Complaint.

Plaintiff Ema Bell's unopposed Motion To File Second Amended Complaint is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court grants Plaintiff leave to file the proposed Second Amended Complaint. Plaintiff must file her Second Amended Complaint, which must be substantially identical to Exhibit A to the Stipulation, within ten days of entry of this order.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
